choices.text: AccessControl: bytes32 constant MINTER_ROLE = keccak256("MINTER_ROLE"); onlyRole(MINTER_ROLE) modifier. Multiple distinct roles; grant/revoke per address. More flexible than single-owner Ownable.

@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable + hardhat-upgrades plugin. TransparentUpgradeableProxy delegates calls to implementation; upgrade via upgrades.upgradeProxy. Validates storage layout to prevent slot conflicts.

questions.explanation: OZ Upgrades plugin + Transparent Proxy = safe upgrades.
